root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is a large formatting/tooling change (running gofmt under Go 1.17) and includes various build-tag adjustments such as `//go:build !race`. There is no concrete flaky-test failure signature or targeted stabilization mechanism to classify a specific flakiness root cause here.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
